---
title: "Lady Sophia Matilda Palmer"
---

## Lady Sophia Matilda Palmer

**Dates:** (1852-1915)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1886), daughter of the 1st Earl of Selborne

### Biography

She married (1903) Count de Franqueville.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 6th 1893
- Letter from August 21, 1893.
- Letter from July 11th, 1883
- Letter from Aug 20th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
